events.title: Referral received
events.detail: New referral from Zuckerberg San Francisco General for client 1127. Starting intake pipeline.

events.title: Client profile structured
events.detail: Diet orders: cardiovascular. Allergies: fish, soy, sesame. Sodium ceiling 700 mg/meal, carbs 35–70 g/meal. Prefers American; dislikes pork. Cooking ability: stovetop. 10 meals/week, zone Richmond.

events.title: Dispatching Clinical Matching Agent
events.detail: Hard constraint hierarchy locked: allergens → sodium → carbs → diet-order tags. Exclusion rules, never scoring penalties.

events.title: Scanning inventory
events.detail: Scoring all 80 meals against hard constraints, then ranking survivors by cuisine preference and dislike avoidance.

events.title: Rejected: Turkey and Avocado Sandwich
events.detail: Excluded — diet order 'cardiovascular': meal lacks 'heart-healthy' tag.

events.title: Matched: Overnight Oats with Berries
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 300/700 mg ✓, carbs 55 g (target 35–70) ✓, no fish/soy/sesame ✓.

events.title: Matched: Grilled Chicken Garden Salad
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 333/700 mg ✓, carbs 39 g (target 35–70) ✓, no fish/soy/sesame ✓.

events.title: Matched: Herb Roasted Chicken with Mashed Potatoes
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 430/700 mg ✓, carbs 43 g (target 35–70) ✓, no fish/soy/sesame ✓.

events.title: Route assigned
events.detail: Client 1127 added to route R-RICH-1 (Richmond), delivery 2026-07-21, window 12:00–14:00. Cold chain OK.

events.title: Plan complete
events.detail: Client 1127: 10 compliant meal(s) at fallback level 0. 0 hard-constraint violations.
